questions.answer:
[p2] INCOME SUMMARY AND SUPPORTING DETAILS
Section 2.1 Payroll and W-2 income.
The applicant reports verified payroll income of $17,000 per month from Analytical Engines LLC.
Section 2.2 Self-employment and freelance income.
The applicant reports freelance consulting income of $3,200 per month from independent contracts.
Section 2.3 Combined income total.
After reviewing payroll stubs and freelance invoices, total monthly income is $20,200.
The applicant provided supporting income documentation for each income source listed above.

[p3] MONTHLY DEBT OBLIGATIONS
Section 3.1 Installment debt.
Automobile loan monthly payment reported as $420 per month.
Section 3.2 Revolving debt.
Credit card minimum monthly payment reported as $180 per month.
Section 3.3 Total monthly debt.
Combined recurring monthly debt obligations total $600 per month.
Underwriter note: debt figures were taken from the most recent credit report pull.

[p4] UNDERWRITING DECISION MEMO
Debt-to-income ratio calculated at 2.97 percent based on verified income and debt.
Applicant credit score from bureau file: 740.
Recommended underwriting action: approve subject to standard closing conditions.
This memo summarizes findings from the loan application packet dated 2026-03-15.

[p2] PAYMENT TERMS AND BILLING
Monthly recurring service fee: $8,500.
Invoices are payable under net 30 payment terms from invoice date.
Late payments accrue a finance charge of 1.5% per month on unpaid balances.
Vendor billing contact: billing@northwind.example.com.
Customer accounts payable contact: ap@contoso.example.com.

[p3] TERMINATION AND REMEDIES
Either party may terminate this agreement for material breach.
The non-breaching party must provide 30 days written notice of the material breach.
Termination for material breach is permitted only if the breach remains uncured after notice.
Confidential information must remain protected through termination and for 12 months thereafter.

[p2] Income summary: verified payroll income is $17,000 per month from Analytical Engines LLC; freelance consulting income is $3,200 per month from independent contracts. [p2] Combined income total after reviewing payroll stubs and freelance invoices is $20,200 per month; supporting income documentation provided for each listed source. [p4] Recommended underwriting action is approve subject to standard closing conditions; memo summarizes findings from loan application packet dated 2026-03-15.

- table_totals: [p3] Combined recurring monthly debt obligations total $600 per month.
